examples: At the upper timberline the trees begin to become twisted and deformed.
This rapid zone of transition is called the upper timberline or tree line.
There are some areas, however, where broadleaf deciduous trees form the timberline.
Many of the outdoor scenes were shot at the Timberline, a ski resort in the shadows of Mount Hood.
The Kohnstamm family, which runs resort rival Timberline Lodge, already has an eight-condo complex with first-floor retail going in up the street.
